title: Global Betting Report
tagline: Built for journalists, by a journalist.
headline: Books Wait on Prices as Board Takes Shape
snapshot: Fast odds context for moneylines, spreads, totals, implied probability, fantasy angles, weather and late price movement.
source_mode: odds-market interpretation engine with line movement, futures watch, weather context, and newsroom-ready betting explanation

theme.name: Global Betting Report
theme.style: black, deep red, white, warm neutral, and odds-ticket gold accents

key_storylines: Betting Markets: Books Wait on Prices as Board Takes Shape
Weather Impact: MLB totals get sharper once wind and rain risk enter the board
Futures Watch: Futures Board Moves With Roster News

live_newsroom.headline: Books Wait on Prices as Board Takes Shape

MOVEMENT: unavailable until an opener and current price exist.

live_newsroom.title: Weather Impact
live_newsroom.headline: MLB totals get sharper once wind and rain risk enter the board
live_newsroom.snapshot: Weather is one of the clearest context layers that separates useful betting analysis from a raw odds board.
key_data: GAME: MLB weather board
MARKET: Baseball totals and live-betting volatility.
LINE / ODDS: Weather can push totals before first pitch.
IMPLIED PROBABILITY: not applicable to weather-only cards.
MOVEMENT: wind and rain can force total movement.
live_newsroom.why_it_matters: Weather is one of the clearest context layers that separates useful betting analysis from a raw odds board.
live_newsroom.what_to_watch: Wind, temperature, precipitation and park shape can move baseball totals before first pitch.

live_newsroom.title: Futures Watch
live_newsroom.headline: Futures Board Moves With Roster News
live_newsroom.snapshot: Betting readers often track markets before games are near. Keeping futures alive gives the site year-round value.
key_data: GAME: Futures board
MARKET: NFL, college football, NBA, NHL, MLB, soccer, tennis and golf futures.
LINE / ODDS: Long-range prices change after roster, schedule and injury news.
IMPLIED PROBABILITY: compare futures prices before and after major news.
MOVEMENT: shortening prices show growing support; drifting prices show resistance.
live_newsroom.why_it_matters: Betting readers often track markets before games are near. Keeping futures alive gives the site year-round value.
live_newsroom.what_to_watch: Schedule releases, injuries, coaching changes, transfers, trades, playoff paths and major tournament draws can move futures.

key_data: Weather layer is ready for MLB betting context.
Wind, temperature, and rain risk should be surfaced before first pitch.
This section should explain how weather may affect totals, pitching, and live markets.
cards.why_it_matters: Weather gives Global Betting Report a practical edge beyond basic odds display.
cards.what_to_watch: Wire in structured weather data after the core odds engine is stable.

sections.title: Futures Watch
cards: College Football Futures: Keep the board visible year-round because bettors track long-range prices months before kickoff.
NFL Futures: Watch schedule strength, quarterback health, roster movement and divisional prices.
NBA Futures: Track playoff paths, injury news, rest patterns and championship price movement.
NHL Futures: Watch goalie health, playoff seeding, travel spots and market adjustment.
Soccer Futures: Track title races, promotion/relegation pressure, tournament paths and transfer-window movement.
Tennis/Golf Futures: Draws, form, surface, course fit and injury news can reshape prices quickly.

sections.title: Late Market Checks
cards: Market board - Add ODDS_API_KEY in the environment, then rerun this script to populate live games.
MLB weather board - Wind, temperature, precipitation and park shape can move baseball totals before first pitch.
Long-range market board - Schedule releases, injuries, coaching changes, transfers, trades, playoff paths and major tournament draws can move futures.

sections.title: Betting Toolkit
cards: OddsTrader - betting odds, weather, line context, and matchup boards.
OddsTrader MLB Weather - wind, temperature and precipitation context for baseball totals.
The Odds API - structured odds feed for moneylines, spreads, and totals.
Action Network - market movement, betting splits, and injury context.
Covers - matchup pages, odds screens, and trend context.
Sportsbook Review - odds comparison and betting market coverage.

editorial_standard.label: GSR Network Editorial Standard
editorial_standard.text: No gambling advice or picks. Prices, injuries, lineups, weather and fantasy usage are organized for human betting context.
